summary: Fix syncWithRegistry() blocker: tiered success_rate defaults and seed collision metadata merge. Prevents imported skills from getting flat 0.75 default that triggers match-all fallback.
author: atlas-orchestrator

changes.description: Replaced flat success_rate:0.75 default in syncWithRegistry() with tiered category-based defaults: debugging/testing/review=0.70, general/meta/planning/reasoning/memory/observability=0.65, experimental/niche=0.50
Fixed seed collision handling in syncWithRegistry(): when imported skill name matches seeded skill, now merges registry metadata (triggers, tags) into existing entry instead of skipping entirely
Added source: 'seed' field to _seedGeneralSkills() definitions for tracking purposes

rationale: Prevents the toxic combination where flat 0.75 default caused all imported skills to match all task contexts via the success_rate>0.7 fallback (now removed in companion fix). Tiered defaults ensure imported skills start conservatively.
notes: TDD cycle completed. 9/9 tests passing in sync-registry.test.js. CommonJS/ESM interop resolved by using require() in tests. No regressions.
